prompt: We have three ADRs in docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/: 0001 (accepted), 0002 (proposed), 0003 (proposed). Compose tech-design.md.

assertions.name: lists_proposed_adrs
assertions.check: Response specifically names ADR-0002 and ADR-0003 as the blocking proposed ADRs.

assertions.name: routes_to_define_adr
assertions.check: Response tells the user to accept the proposed ADRs (via define-adr) before re-invoking.

assertions.name: no_tech_design_written
assertions.check: No tech-design.md file is written under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/.

assertions.name: no_issues_filed
assertions.check: No `gh issue create` invocations are made.
